articles.title: Bilgin Yachts announces sale of flagship 82m superyacht Project Bond
articles.quote: This yacht is thoughtfully engineered for the American market with a minimal draught of 3.6 metres for accessing more harbours and shallow cruising grounds.

articles.title: John Staluppi Is Building His Last Boat — And Bilgin Yachts' Biggest
articles.quote: This Bilgin 82m is classic Staluppi: bold yet practical, balancing the owner's longstanding priorities for global cruising capability and practical harbor access.

articles.title: Turquoise Yachts launches 88m flagship superyacht project Vento
articles.quote: As the largest yacht ever built in Turkey, Vento reflects the collective expertise, dedication and passion applied to designing, engineering and crafting yachts at Turquoise.

articles.title: The Largest Yacht Ever Built in Turkey Just Hit the Seas
articles.quote: As the largest yacht ever built in Turkey, Vento reflects the collective expertise, dedication, and passion applied to designing, engineering, and crafting yachts at Turquoise.

articles.title: Inside Damen Yachting's first Xplorer 60 yacht After You
articles.quote: The owner made virtually no changes, save for a few TVs, to the Xplorer 60's carefully planned interior design by H2 Yacht Design.

articles.title: Explorer Yacht After You and Support Yacht Emotional: Two Deliveries to Same Owner
articles.quote: The first Xplorer 60 from the shipyard has the engineering to back this up, particularly a hull meeting the IMO's Polar Code requirements for navigating in ice.

articles.title: First look inside third 80m Bilgin 263 superyacht Al Reem
articles.quote: Al Reem is the realisation of the owner's vision for tranquillity, art and uncompromising comfort on the water — a minimalist masterpiece in the world of luxury yachting.

articles.title: Mangusta delivers fourth Oceano 44 superyacht The Great Escape
articles.quote: Built in steel and aluminium, the Oceano 44 is designed as a 'modern floating loft' and the spiritual successor to its slightly smaller sister, the Mangusta Oceano 43.

articles.title: Fourth Mangusta Oceano 44 superyacht The Great Escape launched
articles.quote: The fourth hull in the Mangusta Oceano 44 series officially hit the water at the Overmarine Group's facility in Viareggio.

articles.title: On board the largest yacht built in Canada: Crescent Custom Yachts' 50m Danzante Bay
articles.quote: I did not set out to build the largest yacht in Canada. I like to be a little under the radar.

articles.title: 50m Crescent flagship Danzante Bay delivered
articles.quote: The superyacht departed from the shipyard's facilities in British Columbia on 3 March and is now moored in San Diego.

articles.title: Inside Bilgin's dazzling 80m Leona
articles.quote: The interior of Leona uses a bold, opulent palette incorporating a high level of intricate detailing with decorative finishes and interesting textures.

articles.title: Alpha Custom Yachts reveals first images of 38m Drako
articles.quote: The yacht's fully-open galley has been designed to ensure a connected and convivial onboard atmosphere, with the lounge located aft and full-height glazing around the seating area.

articles.title: Onboard the 38m Alpha Custom yacht Drako
articles.quote: Drako showcases Alpha Custom Yachts' innovative approach to yacht design, emphasising community-centric features and ease of movement throughout the vessel.

articles.title: Tatiana: On board the 80m superyacht with a bow shaped like a bullet
articles.quote: Not only does this superyacht meet the exacting performance standards of the luxury industry but it sets the bar for Turkey's growing high-end yacht sector.

articles.title: Interior Insight: 80m Tatiana, Bilgin's Largest Superyacht to Date
articles.quote: We tried to bring a crisp and contemporary feel by using a rich palette of colours.

articles.title: Arrow: The 75m Feadship yacht built for a first-time owner
articles.quote: He didn't want any fixed or folding balconies, or a plumb bow. He was clear he wanted the S-shaped hull line.

articles.title: Charter yacht of the week: Arrow, the 75m Feadship that's perfect for multi-generational cruising
articles.quote: The standout feature on Arrow is her full-beam beach club, with cinema nights, gym sessions, sea-level sundowners and slow mornings in the spa.

articles.title: Heesen Yachts delivers 56m M/Y 'Galvas'
articles.quote: This was the first time that H2 Yacht Design worked with the Dutch superyacht builder, and aesthetically speaking, was a collaboration that worked well.

articles.title: Heesen 56m superyacht Galvas delivered
articles.quote: Galvas' efficiency and speed have been attributed to the FDHF hull shape created by Van Oossanen Naval Architects, paired with H2's clean exterior styling.

articles.title: Scout: The 64m Hakvoort explorer inspired by Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea
articles.quote: James wanted the boat to look as if it had had another life before it became a yacht.

articles.title: Hakvoort's Scout Seen on Sea Trials
articles.quote: With her high bow, massive grey hull and towering decks, it's hard not to get the sense that this nearly 64-metre yacht is meant for open seas and far horizons.

articles.title: GO: Inside Turquoise Yachts' new 77 metre flagship
articles.quote: The design concept of the yacht is based on water in motion, so shades of turquoise made sense.

articles.title: A closer look at 77m M/Y 'Go'
articles.quote: H2 Yacht Design was responsible for conceiving what the yard calls 'a modern classic', from the fluidly sinuous exterior lines to the interior theme of 'water in motion'.

articles.title: Video: 123m Lürssen superyacht Al Lusail delivered
articles.quote: This highly secretive project features in-house naval architecture and exterior styling by British studio H2 Yacht Design.

articles.title: Lürssen Launch 123m Superyacht Project Jupiter
articles.quote: The H2-designed 123m Project Jupiter has been christened Al Lusail, taking its place among the largest yachts ever delivered by the German yard.

articles.title: Razan: The 47m superyacht reinvented by Turquoise
articles.quote: Razan is a lesson in reinvention — for both the yacht and the shipyard. Razan owes her simple and understated styling to H2 Yacht Design, which was instrumental in seeing the project through.

articles.title: First look: Turquoise Yachts and H2 Design's new 47m Razan
articles.quote: The designers removed the original fashion plates to install cantilevered decks that create a floating appearance, giving Razan a sense of constant contact with the sea.

articles.title: Bilgin 156 yacht launched and named Nerissa
articles.quote: The elegant profile is a collaboration defined by sweeping curves and a poised, powerful stance.

articles.title: Life on board 48-meter superyacht Nerissa by Bilgin
articles.quote: The interior style is highly modern and bright, with large windows and a copper colour scheme complemented by subtle touches of wood variants and precious metals.

articles.title: Andromeda: Inside the 107m Kleven explorer yacht
articles.quote: The portrayal of strength is not misleading. It is what it is. Andromeda is a boat to be used.

articles.title: Maryah — Elefsis Shipyard, 125m, 2014
articles.quote: A former Russian research vessel launched in Poland in 1991, Maryah has been completely rebuilt at Elefsis Shipyards in Greece over five years, with H2 Yacht Design responsible for both her exterior and interior.

articles.title: 125m Maryah Superyacht
articles.quote: Accommodating 54 guests across six decks, Maryah offers an extraordinary roster of amenities including a helipad, movie theatre, beach club and Jacuzzi.

articles.title: Kosatka yacht — Blohm & Voss, 82m, 2014
articles.quote: Originally built by Sevmash in Russia, the Project Graceful superyacht was moved to Germany where Blohm + Voss added a bulbous bow and reworked the superstructure to H2 Yacht Design's specifications.

articles.title: Yacht GRACEFUL, a Blohm & Voss Superyacht
articles.quote: Unique features include an impressive 15m x 3m indoor pool with raising dance floor, as well as a substantial helicopter deck.
